ddls:
CREATE TABLE "historical_figures" (
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical figure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the historical figure */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the historical figure */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the historical figure */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the historical figure */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the historical figure */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation or primary role during the American Revolution */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the historical figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group or committee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group or committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group or committee */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the group was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Primary location or headquarters of the group */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing group_types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES group_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group or committee */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., member, leader, associate) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the figure joined the group */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the figure left the group or the group dissolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or significant contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the group type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the group type (e.g., political, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "group_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first group */,
  "group_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second group */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., affiliate, rival, ally) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_relationships_group_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("group_id2") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_relationships_group_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("group_id1") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "figure_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "figure_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first historical figure */,
  "figure_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second historical figure */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, family, colleague) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or reason for the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_figure_relationships_figure_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id1") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_figure_relationships_figure_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id2") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the event (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the historical figure in the event */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the figure's contribution to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)
